The Best AI Call Handler
for UK Tradespeople (2026)

If you're a plumber, electrician, roofer, builder, or heating engineer in the UK, you already know the problem. Your phone rings while you're on a job, at the merchants, driving between sites, or after hours. Every missed call is a £250-£450 job going to your competitor.

AI call handlers promise to solve this. They answer your phone 24/7, qualify the caller, and send you the details so you only speak to real jobs. But which one actually works for UK tradespeople?

We tested five leading options - signing up, making test calls, checking WhatsApp delivery, and comparing pricing. Here's what we found.

Try #1 Pick Free for 7 Days

Detailed Reviews

1

whoza.ai

Best for Tradespeople Who Want a Full Revenue Team

From £59/month 7 days free trial 30 minutes setup

whoza.ai is the only platform that gives you four AI specialists working together - not just one voice answering the phone.

How it works:

  • Katie answers every call 24/7. She qualifies the job, captures the postcode, checks urgency, and sends it all to your WhatsApp.
  • Mark follows up on high-value quotes and chases outstanding enquiries.
  • Claire automatically requests Google reviews from happy customers.
  • Rex tracks what your competitors are doing - pricing changes, new reviews, who's ranking where.

What you see

A WhatsApp message with the caller's name, job type, location, estimated value, and urgency - plus Accept Job, Call Back, and Decline buttons. Two taps. No app to download. No login. It just works in the WhatsApp you already use.

Best for

Tradespeople who want more than just call answering - they want a system that actively grows their business. The review collection and competitor tracking are genuinely useful features no one else offers.

🏆 Verdict:

Pricier than the cheapest option. The pilot programme is limited to 50 tradespeople initially. You need to be comfortable with WhatsApp as your primary business communication tool.

Try whoza.ai free for 7 days
2

Clara

Best for Tradespeople on a Budget

£49.99/month 7 days free trial 10 minutes (via app) setup

Clara is the simplest and cheapest dedicated AI call handler for UK trades. Download the app, pick a voice, set your greeting, and she starts answering.

How it works:

  • Clara answers your calls, takes messages, flags urgent calls, filters spam, and delivers summaries to your phone.
  • You can choose from 20+ natural-sounding voices.
  • The app handles everything - call forwarding, transcripts, recordings, and live chat support.

What you see

Summaries delivered through the app, not native WhatsApp (though summaries come to your phone).

Best for

Sole traders who want a straightforward, affordable call handler and don't mind managing another app. The 7-day trial with no credit card makes it low-risk to try.

Honest downside:

Single AI persona - she answers calls but doesn't do reviews, competitor tracking, or follow-ups. Requires app download. Delivery is through the app, not native WhatsApp.

Try Clara
3

Trade Receptionist

Best for Traditional Phone-Based Service

From £29/month Unknown free trial 1-2 days setup

Trade Receptionist is the budget option. At £29/month, they're the cheapest dedicated call answering service for trades.

How it works:

  • A more traditional setup - calls are answered and details sent via email and a web dashboard.
  • They also offer diary management and WhatsApp integration.
  • The lower price comes with a longer setup time (1-2 days) and a 12-month minimum contract.

What you see

Email + dashboard delivery. Slower than WhatsApp.

Best for

Tradespeople who want the absolute lowest monthly cost and are comfortable with email-based call summaries. The diary management feature is useful if you need booking support.

Honest downside:

12-month contract locks you in. Email + dashboard delivery is slower than WhatsApp. Single-agent capacity means you can only handle 1-2 simultaneous calls. Less sophisticated AI - more of a traditional answering service with AI elements.

Try Trade Receptionist
4

Moneypenny

Best for Larger Trade Businesses

From £150/month 7 days free trial 2-5 days setup

Moneypenny is the established name - 25 years in business, 10,000+ clients, 1,250 staff. They offer a hybrid human + AI service.

How it works:

  • A blend of human receptionists and AI technology.
  • Calls are answered by real people supported by AI tools.
  • You get call summaries, appointment booking, and full CRM integration.

What you see

A polished web dashboard. Call summaries via email.

Best for

Multi-van operations and larger trade businesses that need a premium service with human oversight. If you're turning over £500K+ and want the 'safe' option, Moneypenny is it.

Honest downside:

3-7x more expensive than the others. 12-month contract. 2-5 day setup. Overkill for sole traders and small firms. You're paying for human receptionists whether you need them or not.

Try Moneypenny
5

Rosie AI

Best for US-Based Trades (Limited UK Presence)

From £41/month 7 days free trial 30 minutes setup

Rosie AI is a US-based platform that expanded to the UK. It offers AI call answering with a friendly, conversational approach.

How it works:

  • Rosie answers calls, qualifies leads, takes messages, and delivers via WhatsApp and a companion app.
  • The AI is natural and conversational.
  • The platform includes basic call analytics.

What you see

WhatsApp and companion app delivery.

Best for

Tradespeople who want a US-style customer experience and don't mind a non-UK company handling their calls. The WhatsApp integration is a plus.

Honest downside:

US-based company with limited UK trade market understanding. Customer support may be timezone-challenged. Less tailored to UK trade-specific needs (local regulations, UK trade terminology). Fewer UK-specific features.

Try Rosie AI

How We Tested

We signed up for trials, made test calls, and evaluated each platform on:

Call quality

Did the AI sound natural? Did it capture the right details?

WhatsApp delivery

How quickly did the summary arrive? Was it readable?

Setup ease

How long from signup to first answered call?

Actionability

Could we accept, call back, or decline from the notification?

Price transparency

Were there hidden fees or long contracts?

UK-specific features

Did it understand UK postcodes, local regulations, trade terminology?

Which One Should You Choose?

If you...Choose
Want a full Revenue Team (calls + reviews + competitor tracking)whoza.ai
Want the cheapest dedicated AI call handlerClara
Want the absolute lowest price (and don't mind a contract)Trade Receptionist
Run a multi-van operation and want human + AIMoneypenny
Prefer a US-based platformRosie AI

Frequently Asked Questions

What is an AI call handler?

An AI call handler is a virtual receptionist powered by artificial intelligence. It answers your business phone 24/7, speaks to callers in a natural voice, captures their details, qualifies the enquiry, and sends you a summary - so you only speak to real jobs.

How much does an AI call handler cost?

UK AI call handlers range from £29 to £400 per month. Most trade-specific options fall between £49 and £59 per month. All major providers offer free trials.

Can an AI call handler book jobs into my calendar?

Yes. Most AI call handlers (including whoza.ai, Clara, and Moneypenny) can integrate with your calendar to book appointments directly. whoza.ai sends booking confirmations via WhatsApp.

What happens to calls outside business hours?

AI call handlers work 24/7, including evenings, weekends, and bank holidays. Every call is answered, qualified, and logged - you'll see every enquiry in your WhatsApp or app when you check in the morning.

Is an AI call handler better than a human receptionist?

For most UK tradespeople, yes. An AI call handler costs £59/month versus £20,000+/year for a full-time receptionist. It works 24/7, never takes sick leave, and handles unlimited simultaneous calls. The only exception is large firms that need complex customer service - Moneypenny's hybrid model works better there.

Do I need to change my phone number?

No. All providers let you keep your existing business number. Calls are forwarded to the AI service, or you can get a new number if you prefer.

Can the AI sound like a real person?

Yes. Modern AI voices (like those used by whoza.ai and Clara) are indistinguishable from human receptionists. Most callers won't know they're speaking to AI.

What if the AI gets something wrong?

You get full call transcripts and recordings, so you can review everything. If the AI makes an error, you can listen back and correct it. Accuracy improves over time as the AI learns your business.

Which AI call handler works with WhatsApp?

whoza.ai delivers all alerts natively in WhatsApp - no app download required. Clara delivers summaries to your phone. Trade Receptionist offers WhatsApp integration. Moneypenny uses email. Rosie AI uses WhatsApp + app.

How quickly can I get set up?

Fastest: Clara (10 minutes via app). whoza.ai and Rosie AI (30 minutes). Trade Receptionist (1-2 days). Moneypenny (2-5 days).

Bottom Line

For UK tradespeople in 2026, AI call handling has gone from a luxury to a necessity. The ONS reports that 62% of after-hours calls go unanswered - and every unanswered call is a job your competitor gets instead.

If you want the most capable system - one that answers calls, collects reviews, tracks competitors, and delivers everything through WhatsApp - whoza.ai is the clear choice. The 7-day free trial makes it risk-free to try.

Try whoza.ai free for 7 days

No credit card required · 30-day money-back guarantee
